content.en:
The Dao Ancestor who suddenly appeared was none other than Ye Tian.

Ye Tian led a group of Terran Dao Ancestors to this large-scale forbidden treasure land to snatch forbidden strange objects and forbidden treasures, and happened to sense that something was wrong with the God of War Tower, so he came over in person.

After all, he is so familiar with the Yunzi Goddess, if he can't see it, it's fine, but now that he sees it, it is naturally impossible to ignore it.

"Thank you Wanfa Dao Ancestor!"

One of the surviving Dao Ancestors of the God of War Tower hurriedly thanked him.

"Let's go quickly, otherwise there will be a lot of forces that want to destroy your God of War Tower!" Ye Tian reminded.

"Yes Yes Yes !!"

The Dao Ancestors of the God of War Tower quickly left here with those True Ancestors, True Monarchs, Heavenly Monarchs, and many resources and treasures of the God of War Tower, and directly abandoned the headquarters of the God of War Tower.

And the Yunzi Divine Maiden also left with the Dao Ancestors of the God of War Tower, and did not participate in the competition for the large-scale forbidden treasure land.

After all, in a place like a large forbidden treasure land, without the strength of the Sixth or Seventh Heavenly Dao Ancestor, it is not qualified to compete at all, and even the possibility of the fall of the Seventh Heavenly Dao Ancestor is very high.

If she dared to enter the large-scale forbidden treasure land, it was estimated that the probability of her fall was as high as nine out of nine.

The Yunzi Divine Maiden was flying and shuttling, looking in the direction where the large forbidden treasure land was located, and muttered in her heart, "Ye Tian, thank you!"

Ye Tian had saved her many times, but she had nothing to repay, and she was very ashamed in her heart.

At the same time, she also sighed many times.

Once upon a time, she was also a Tianjiao figure on the same level as Ye Tian, but now the gap between the two sides is so big.

In the past, she could at least see Ye Tian's back, but now she can't even see her back.

The Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor who casually killed the Lord of the God of War Tower was an ant that could be killed at hand in Ye Tian's eyes, and it was conceivable how powerful Ye Tian's strength was.

------------

The person who rescued the God of War Tower was just a small episode for Ye Tian, and at this moment he had already arrived at the large forbidden treasure land.

This large forbidden treasure is a representation of the world of water, the endless sea envelops the entire forbidden treasure land, and the sea is dotted with isolated islands, which are home to many forbidden and strange things.

Therefore, each isolated island is the target of the Dao Ancestors.

Ye Tian's strength was so strong, he easily collected a large number of forbidden strange things, and no one dared to compete with him at all.

A large forbidden treasure on an isolated island.

A forbidden treasure was born, and the strong fluctuations of the taboo rules spread, attracting the attention of many Dao ancestors, and they came quickly one by one.

When they arrive, they find that things are different from what they imagined.

The corpse of a Dao Ancestor lay on an isolated island, but there was no trace of battle on the isolated island, as if these Dao Ancestors had been wiped out by an invisible force.

This strange scene made many Dao Ancestors cautious, and they didn't even dare to step into the isolated island easily.

However, there are people who are not afraid of this scene.

I saw a Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor rushing into the isolated island, trying to snatch the forbidden treasure.

After all, the Forbidden Treasure is almost the target of the Supreme Dao Ancestor and the Invincible Dao Ancestor, and he has almost no chance to snatch a Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor, and now the Supreme Dao Ancestor and the Invincible Dao Ancestor have not yet arrived, and at this moment, they are the Seven Heavenly Dao Ancestors.

Therefore, if he is the first to snatch it and then desperately escape, it is very likely that he will leave here.

In an instant, he came to the lonely island and saw the forbidden treasure.

This forbidden treasure is a black round piece of wood, three meters in diameter and ten meters high, and an illusory image appears on top of the black wood, which seems to be a tiny small roc suspended here.

This Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor knew that this forbidden treasure would cause great terror, so he threw a forbidden bloodline creature from the inner world in an attempt to draw out the great terror.

When the forbidden bloodline creature collided with the black wood, the body instantly disintegrated, and the great terror was drawn out.

However, something happened that this Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor didn't expect.

I saw that the Dapeng Phantom stretched out a claw and grabbed it directly at the Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor.

"How could it be ......?"

This Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor was dumbfounded.

How can the Great Terror take the initiative to attack people? It has always been the case that someone who touches the Great Terror will be attacked.

Escape!

He wanted to escape, but under this illusory grasp, the whole person seemed to be frozen and frozen, and he couldn't move at all.

Wow!

Grabbing it with one claw, the flesh of this Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor cracked, his soul collapsed, and he completely fell and died.

Outside the island.

Many Dao Ancestors sensed the fall of this Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor, and finally knew how the previous Dao Ancestor fell, and he was directly wiped out by the Great Terror, and he took the initiative to erase it.

It's so weird!

For a moment, no Dao Ancestor dared to enter this isolated island again.

Wow!

A supreme Dao Ancestor descended here, and he was very curious to see that these Dao Ancestors had not entered the isolated island.

"What's going on here, why hasn't anyone gone into the island to snatch that forbidden treasure?"

Supreme Dao Ancestor Xingluan Dao Ancestor asked.

"Xingluan Dao Ancestor, the Great Terrifying Phantom Drawn by that Forbidden Treasure would actually directly attack people, and those Dao Ancestors who entered the isolated island were all silently wiped out!" explained a Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor.

"How could it be !!"

Xingluan Dao Ancestor didn't believe it a little, but when others said the same, he had to believe it.

At this point, he hesitated.

He is undoubtedly the strongest person here, and if he snatches that forbidden treasure, it must belong to him, and no one can resist.

And when other supreme Dao Ancestors and invincible Dao Ancestors such as the mentally handicapped came, it would be no for him.

Danger and opportunity!

"It's done!"

Xingluan Dao Ancestor gritted his teeth and said.

Immediately, he sneaked up on some of the weaker Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestors, and the starlight restrained them.

Anyway, these Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestors are not the Dao Ancestors of their own forces, so it doesn't matter if they kill them.

"I'm sorry!"

Xingluan Dao Ancestor secretly said.

Dozens of Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestors were captured by Xingluan Dao Ancestors and brought into the isolated island by him.

Then, Xingluan Dao Ancestor threw all these dozens of Seven Heavenly Dao Ancestors on top of the black wood Forbidden Treasure, and at the same time, he also threw out many forbidden bloodline creatures that had been suppressed by the world in his body.

With so many Dao Ancestors and Forbidden Bloodline creatures, he didn't believe that he couldn't counteract the Great Terror.

He believed that the reason why those Dao Ancestors had fallen before was because the Great Terror was too powerful to be counteracted, which would lead to the Great Terror attacking and dying.

"No!"

"Xingluan Dao Ancestor, you can't die well!"

"If we die, Xingluan Dao Ancestor, you have to die too!"

One Dao Ancestor scolded angrily.

Wow!

The Great Terror was drawn out, and the bodies of one Dao Ancestor solidified and cracked, and their souls were annihilated in an instant, and even those forbidden bloodline creatures died in an instant.

However, even so, the Great Terror did not go away.

Swish!

An illusory claw struck at the Star Luan Dao Ancestor.

"Impossible!"

Xingluan Daozu was completely panicked, and he couldn't believe this scene.

Burst!

The illusory claws ignored his defenses and forbidden weapon-grade defensive armor and passed directly through his body, his eyes gradually dimming.
